## Summary

A brief description of the changes in this Pull Request. Explain **what** was changed and **why**.

## Type of Change

Please check the relevant options:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (changes to README, contributing guidelines, etc.)
- [ ] 🎨 Style/Refactor (code style formatting, restructuring without changing behavior)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (optimization that improves speed or memory usage)
- [ ] 🔒 Security (fixes a security vulnerability)
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility (improves screen reader, keyboard, or focus behavior)

## Related Issues

Closes #[Issue Number]

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] The project builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] I have verified these changes work on mobile, tablet, and desktop (if UI-related)
- [ ] I have considered accessibility implications (aria-labels, keyboard nav, focus)
